_readme: Saurav's weekly curation file for The GenAI Brief. Edit this, then run `node scripts/generate-brief.js`. See SETUP_BRIEF.md. The generator synthesizes the week into two bullet panels (What Happened / Why You Should Care) plus an optional table, an optional 'also this week' list, an optional 'by the numbers' grid, and a takeaway. LAZY WEEK: leave items empty and it auto-fetches. CURATED WEEK: add items and set autoFetchCount to 0. HYBRID: add a few items and set autoFetchCount to how many more to auto-fetch. The AI drafts the table and the numbers (review them). Anything you hand-set below (comparisonTable, byTheNumbers, radar) overrides the AI.

_example_item.title: Optional hand-picked headline (leave items empty to auto-fetch)
_example_item.note: Optional: your own angle. If blank, the AI summarizes from the title/blurb.

_example_comparisonTable.title: Frontier Model Pricing — July 2026 (USD per 1M tokens)

_example_radar.text: did a smaller thing worth a mention
